case_title: LIU, ALEX vs. MOLINA, TERESA et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MOLINA, TERESA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 545 O'FARRELL, #216, LEASE FORFEITED, DEFT. AGREES TO VACATE PREMISES BY 15-NOV-94; UPON SIGNING STIP PLTF. SHALL RETURN DEFTS. $265.00 SECURITY DEPOSIT; DEFT. AGREES TO NO STAY OF EXECUTION; EACH SIDE TO BEAR OWN FEES AND COSTS; (SEE FILE FOR DETAILS).
